# Server-Facing Metadata Evidence

Executable SSOT: [`internal/hostintegration/privacy_metadata_allowlist.riido.json`](../../../../internal/hostintegration/privacy_metadata_allowlist.riido.json).

Evidence manifest: [`server-facing-metadata.riido.json`](server-facing-metadata.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `privacy-metadata-evidence`.

Generates the reader-facing C10/C11 metadata boundary from the executable privacy metadata allowlist and the Go server-facing metadata shape.

## c11-server-facing-client-metadata

- owner context: `C11`

| Boundary | JSON path |
| --- | --- |
| allowed | `distribution_channel` |
| allowed | `app_version` |
| allowed | `providers` |
| allowed | `providers.provider_kind` |
| allowed | `providers.provider_available` |
| allowed | `providers.provider_login_status` |
| allowed | `providers.routing_status` |
| forbidden | `provider_executable_path` |
| forbidden | `workspace_root_path` |
| forbidden | `token` |
| forbidden | `api_key` |
| forbidden | `raw_environment` |

## c10-provider-status-sync-request

- owner context: `C10`

| Boundary | JSON path |
| --- | --- |
| allowed | `daemon_id` |
| allowed | `device_id` |
| allowed | `runtime_id` |
| allowed | `distribution_channel` |
| allowed | `app_version` |
| allowed | `providers` |
| allowed | `providers.provider_kind` |
| allowed | `providers.routing_status` |

| forbidden | `provider_available` |
| forbidden | `provider_login_status` |
| forbidden | `token` |
| forbidden | `api_key` |
| forbidden | `raw_environment` |

## Rules

- Server-facing metadata allowed paths: `distribution_channel`, `app_version`, `providers`, `providers.provider_kind`, `providers.provider_available`, `providers.provider_login_status`, `providers.routing_status`.
- Provider-status sync request allowed paths: `daemon_id`, `device_id`, `runtime_id`, `distribution_channel`, `app_version`, `providers`, `providers.provider_kind`, `providers.routing_status`.
- Provider executable paths, workspace absolute paths, tokens, API keys, and raw environments stay local.
- `provider_available` and `provider_login_status` remain C11 projection fields for provider-status sync.
- Capability fingerprint and binary version stay outside this metadata until a separate C3/C4 sync contract exists.
